name: Hormuz Full Blockade
description: Complete blockade of the Strait of Hormuz — the world's most critical oil chokepoint handling ~21 Mb/d. Simulates a severe geopolitical crisis in the Persian Gulf.

name: Hormuz Partial Disruption (50%)
description: Partial disruption of the Strait of Hormuz at 50% severity — representing mine threats, military tensions, or insurance cost escalation reducing traffic.

name: Bab el-Mandeb Blockade
description: Full blockade of Bab el-Mandeb strait — as seen with Houthi attacks on shipping. Affects Red Sea / Suez traffic.

name: Malacca Strait Crisis
description: Full blockade of the Strait of Malacca — the primary route for Middle Eastern oil to East Asia (~16 Mb/d throughput).

name: Russian Export Embargo to Europe
description: Total Russian oil export embargo toward European countries — simulating a full energy decoupling scenario.

name: Saudi Production Collapse (-40%)
description: Major Saudi production disruption — simulating attacks on oil infrastructure (e.g., Abqaiq-style attack at larger scale).

name: Combined Gulf Crisis
description: Severe multi-shock scenario: Hormuz blocked, Saudi production drops 30%, and strategic reserves are released globally.

name: Suez Canal + Bab el-Mandeb Double Block
description: Both Red Sea chokepoints blocked — cutting the Europe-Asia maritime shortcut.

name: Asia Demand Surge (+15%)
description: Rapid demand increase in Asia-Pacific region (+15%) — simulating post-pandemic rebound or cold weather spike.

name: Nigerian Supply Disruption + Bosphorus Block
description: Dual supply disruption: Nigerian production halved and Turkish Straits blocked.
